name: provenance entry validator rejects when organizations_count integer disagrees with distinct orgs in supporting_prs
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"verbatim_quote":"x","org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"verbatim_quote":"y","org":"a","tier":1}],"evidence_count":2,"organizations_count":5}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json --check-counts 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'organizations_count_mismatch' err.txt && grep -q 'declared=5' err.txt && grep -q 'actual=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
